description: Selecting an embarked unit in the Movement phase pans + zooms the camera to the transport carrying it. The fixture has Kommandos embarked in Battlewagon Alpha. The camera is first fit to the whole board (unit unselected, transport ~677px from centre), then the embarked Kommandos row is REAL-clicked in the movement unit list (scrolled into view first, since the list only shows ~5 rows). Asserts the camera glide settles centred on Battlewagon Alpha's position (last_camera_fit_action='selection', camera within a few px of the transport centroid, having moved a long way from the zoomed-out framing) and that the disembark dialog opened as before. A final direct check locks in that fit_view_to_selection redirects an embarked passenger to its transport rather than framing its hidden models.

steps.script:
var ul = tree.current_scene.movement_controller.unit_list
ul.get_v_scroll_bar().value = ul.get_item_rect(7).position.y
return ul.get_v_scroll_bar().value >= 0.0
